title: Street Fighter 6/Version/2.00 - SuperCombo Wiki
content_text: Version 2.00 Game Version 2.00 date August 5, 2025 Summary Sagat Release. Minor bug fixes and adjustments (mostly related to Tiger Shot interactions). Links Patch Notes Sagat Patch Sagat released Character Changes A.K.I. Venomous Fang (2PP~P) shifted the projectile invincible hurtbox downward immediately after startup (to ensure it's possible to attack through a Low Tiger Shot) Akuma Adamant Flame Follow-up (214P~6P) fixed an issue where the attack could not be performed while a projectile was on the screen Demon Gou Rasen (236KK~j.214K) fixed an issue where the attack could not be performed while a projectile was on the screen SA1 / Air SA1 changed the amount of Drive Gauge gained on Perfect Parry is the same as other Super Arts (20000) Blanka Backstep Rolling Attack (63214K/KK) fixed an issue where holding forward/back would steer Blanka a different distance depending on whether he was facing left or right Cammy Spiral Arrow (236K/KK) hurtbox expanded upward at the start and during later active frames (to ensure it cannot easily pass under High Tiger Shot) 236LK: frames 1-2, 14-21 236MK: frames 1-2, 14-23 236HK: frames 1-5, 23-32 236KK: frames 1-4, 19-29 SA1 (236236K) upper hurtbox on frames 1-5 that is vulnerable to projectiles expanded upward This ensures that the early startup frames cannot duck under a High Tiger Shot Chun-Li Critical Art (214214K) fixed an issue where the opponent would gain less Drive Gauge when parrying the attack compared to other Super Arts Dhalsim 2LK projectile invincible hurtbox shifted downward (to ensure it's possible to slide under Low Tiger Shot with good timing) Ed LP Psycho Uppercut (623LP) fixed an issue where Ed could cancel the final 4 recovery frames into another action on whiff E. Honda Neko Damashi (22P) fixed an issue where buffering a SA3/CA input would not work Elena Round Arch (4HK) fixed an issue where Elena would slide forward when performed out of Drive Rush when not inputting a direction Critical Art (214214K) fixed an issue where the damage value was increased by 1000 when landing a K.O. against the opponent Kimberly OD Sprint (236KK) Modern Controls (A[6S]) fixed an issue where Down+Forward / Down+Back + Attack would perform Neck Hunter / Emergency Stop instead of Shadow Slide Luke OD Avenger (236KK) armored head hurtbox shifted downward (to prevent interference with High Tiger Shot) M. Bison Drive Impact fixed an issue where the armor could absorb 3 or more hits depending on which part of the body they interacted with Manon Temps Lié (5HP~HP) fixed an issue where Manon could Parry on the final recovery frame on block Marisa 2MP upper hurtboxes made projectile invincible (to prevent interference with High Tiger Shot) 2MK upper hurtboxes made projectile invincible (to prevent interference with High Tiger Shot) 2HK upper hurtboxes made projectile invincible (to prevent interference with High Tiger Shot) Rashid 2HP upper hurtboxes made projectile invincible (to prevent interference with High Tiger Shot) Note: the official patch notes incorrectly attributed this change to 2HK Terry 214LPHP input changed from OD Burning Knuckle to OD Quick Burn SA3/CA (236236P) fixed an issue where the opponent would gain less Drive Gauge compared to other Super Arts on parry or Perfect Parry Zangief Parry hurtbox from frame 3 onward expanded forward This is to match the hurtbox expansion Zangief received in the June 2025 update 2MP upper hurtboxes made projectile invincible (to prevent interference with High Tiger Shot) Tundra Storm (22HK) counter hitbox expanded upward (allowing it to work against Sagat's 5HK/6HK) Double Lariat (Modern Controls: M+H) reverted the change that allowed L+M+H to perform Double Lariat instead of Throw while in Burnout This is due to a bug that caused the move to come out in unintended situations, and is planned to be reimplemented.
